pendingCommands.label: PHASE 2: FIX resumeParser test failures - 2 tests failing in resumeParser.test.js

value.prompt:
FIX: resumeParser._parseExperienceText() - tests expect parsing 'Senior Engineer
Acme
2019 - Present
- Built APIs
Mentored team' to return [{title:'Senior Engineer', company:'Acme', duration:'2019 - Present', description:['Built APIs','Mentored team']}]. Currently returns empty company/duration/description. Fix the parsing logic.

pendingCommands.output:
I found the bug. In `_parseExperienceText()` at line 218, the loop starts at `i=1`, but the code already pre-sets `company = lines[1]` at line 213. This causes the company to be re-processed and added to the description array instead of being skipped.

**The fix**: Change line 218 from `for (let i = 1; ...)` to `for (let i = 2; ...)` so the loop skips the already-assigned title and company fields.

This way, when parsing `'Senior Engineer\nAcme\n2019 - Present\n- Built APIs\nMentored team'`:
- `
